economic_notes: Tanizul Timber Ltd. is a Nation business entity accounted for by the modified equity method. Logging Revenue of $1,691,401 reported in 2021. Earnings from investment in Nation business entities of $2,232,752.
notes: Qualified audit opinion issued for three reasons: (1) budgets not approved by Chief and Council so budget comparison not available; (2) insufficient audit evidence for Tanizul Timber Ltd. investment; (3) insufficient audit evidence for amounts receivable/payable to Binche Whut'en due to Nation separation effective April 1, 2019. CMHC Social Housing Program is consolidated. Tanizul Timber Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method. Separation from Binche Whut'en occurred April 1, 2019. Funds held in trust of $2,798,558 includes Ottawa Trust Fund. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + Provincial + FNHA + CMHC + Other federal = 8555402+6203233+2576652+524848+414119 = 18274254; however including First Nations Associations adds 682152 totaling approximately 18956406 — figure used excludes First Nations Associations and Admin fees as OSR.
